lotteryName: Mitchell-Lama Big Six Towers Two Bedroom Waiting List - 2026
lotteryDescription: Please click the "More Information" link below for important details. The income limits are according to household composition. The minimum income limit is $52,840, while the maximum is $202,500. The purchase price, which is subject to change, is between $47,843 and $53,192. The monthly maintenance, which is subject to change, is between $1,321 and $1,500. There will be a limit of 300 applicants drawn from the lottery. To apply online, click the "Apply Now" link below. To apply by mail, mail a post card or envelope by regular mail to the P.O. Box 37 New York, NY 10272. Registered and certified mail will NOT be accepted. Clearly print your full first and last name, current address, date of birth and the bedroom size lottery you are applying for. Failure to clearly write all information may result in your application not being entered into the lottery. OCCUPANCY STANDARDS: Two to four people. Applicants who live in NYC do not receive a general preference for Mitchell-Lama apartments.

This is a Waiting List to fill 1 vacant unit. Eligible buyers should have  10% of the purchase price available for a down payment.  Please note that the quoted sales prices, maximum household income, asset limit, etc., are estimated and are subject to change.

EACH BUYER MUST OCCUPY THE COOPERATIVE AS THEIR PRIMARY RESIDENCE.  
ANY PROSPECTIVE APPLICANT WHO CURRENTLY OWNS OR PREVIOUSLY HAS PURCHASED A RESIDENTIAL PROPERTY THAT WAS DEVELOPED OR ASSISTED THROUGH A LOCAL, STATE, OR FEDERAL HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM IS INELIGIBLE. 

Online Informational sessions will be held on:
 
Wednesday, April 22, 2026 at 6:30 pm. Below is the link to join.  https://nychpd.webex.com/weblink/register/r2f2b605c5f623f81a389bae5b5b100c3 Seminar attendance is not mandatory to purchase a Cooperative.
amenities: Elevator,Accessible entrance,Common area Wifi,Energy-efficient appliances,On-site resident manager,Outdoor areas,Security cameras,Shared laundry room

lotteryDescription:
Park Towers HDFC is a 93-unit cooperative at 644 Riverside Drive in Hamilton Heights. Twenty-four renovated 1–5 bedroom apartments are available for purchase, featuring hardwood floors and new stainless-steel appliances. The prewar building, originally built in 1914, was acquired by NYC in 2003 and fully rehabilitated with a new roof, façade work, windows, and upgraded units. Amenities include card-operated laundry, and maintenance covers water and heat.
Located on Riverside Drive, the building offers Hudson River and GWB views from upper floors and excellent transit access—5 minutes to the 1 train, 15 minutes to A/C/B/D, and quick access to multiple bus lines. Riverbank State Park is also just a short walk away.
Eligible buyers must have at least 10% down. Tenants pay electricity and cooking gas.
amenities: Elevator,Accessible entrance,Shared laundry room,Smoke-free

lotteryDescription: Forte Living is a newly constructed 18-story building at 205 East 110 Street, offering thoughtfully designed residences, shared amenities, and stunning city views. Designed for modern New York living, it blends everyday comfort with attentive services in vibrant East Harlem, creating homes that are both sophisticated and welcoming. Amenities at Forte Living are curated to support balance and well-being, including a fully equipped fitness center for cardio and strength training*, a modern coworking and lounge space ideal for remote work*, a tranquil spa for relaxation*, and a dedicated poolroom for recreation and socializing*(*fees apply). Situated in one of Manhattan’s fastest growing neighborhoods, Forte Living combines quality, comfort, and convenient access to transportation, green spaces, and daily essentials to support a lasting sense of home. Pet policy of 50lb weight limit. Tenants are responsible for electricity, including electric stove, hot water and heat.

Experience a new level of Brooklyn living at 80 Ainslie Street Apartments, a beautiful newly built residence offering stylishly designed one and two-bedroom apartments in a highly desirable neighborhood. Each beautifully crafted home features sleek contemporary finishes, spacious layouts, and the convenience of in-unit washer and dryers, while residents enjoy premium amenities including elevator access and a stunning rooftop terrace with the perfect atmosphere to unwind and entertain. Perfectly situated near local dining, shopping, entertainment, and transportation, this pet-friendly community welcomes one pet per unit, including cats and small to medium-sized dogs. lotteryDescription:
Elevated living in Brooklyn at Botanic Heights - 960 Franklin Avenue, a striking new residential community bringing 91 affordable apartments to one of the borough’s most vibrant neighborhoods. Residences feature dishwashers and private patios or balconies. Residents can enjoy an electronic doorman, elevator access, and online payment options. An optional amenity package is available for $75/month for one-bedroom residents and $125/month for two-bedroom residents, and includes access to the yoga studio, coworking room, party room, social lounge, and children’s room. Additional optional amenities include a fitness center ($50/month), and on-site parking ($400/month).
Applicants can install and use washer/dryers for a surcharge, which may be set by applicable law. One pet per household (up to 20 lbs.) is permitted with no pet deposit required; service animals are welcome!
Tenants are responsible for electricity, stove, and electric heat/cool split unit. Hot water is included in the rent.

Experience a new standard of luxury living at 534 Third Avenue Apartments, where modern design, upscale amenities, and unbeatable convenience come together — all at rents priced between 60%–85% below the free-market apartments!
These apartments feature in-unit washers and dryers, dishwashers, and spacious layouts — all in a pet-friendly building welcoming 1 pet up to 50 lbs. with no pet deposit required. Service animals are always welcome.
Residents may also enjoy an optional $175/month amenity package including a fitness center*, sauna*, outdoor yard*, lounge*, club room*, game room*, business center*, and furnished roof deck* with stunning city views.
Additional conveniences include a package room, shared laundry room* ($3 per wash), and bike storage lockers* ($25/month).
Near transportation, shopping, dining, and entertainment, 534 Third Avenue offers the blend of comfort, convenience, and affordability!
Tenants are responsible for electricity, including electric stove and heat.
